device_id.description: Must be a string and is required to map back to the SQL device metadata.

arrival_timestamp.description: Must be a date and is required for initial time-series sorting.

protocol.description: Identifies the network protocol used for ingestion.

raw_payload.description: Flexible sub-document. Can hold any unstructured or varied sensor telemetry (temperature, GPS, etc.) without rigid column rules.

validation_status.description: State machine flag used by the C++ processing engine to track what data has been pushed to PostgreSQL.
